title: Retto
body:
Otter mod. It adds new biomes, where underwater you can find the progression's first gem, the RettoBlock. From it, you can craft rettotail, it is very expensive, but it worth the price. It is efficient in any tool's role, and it is the material for RettoArmor. The mod adds RettoWood too.

I mainly created this mod because I like otters, especially seaotters.

This mod is weird, but fun. You should try it
